entities.name: CROPLAND EXTENT
entities.description: The area and boundaries of land used for growing crops, including fallow areas.

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food.

entities.name: FALLOW AREAS
entities.description: Land that is plowed and tilled but left unseeded for a period.

entities.name: SATELLITE EARTH OBSERVATION
entities.description: The use of satellites to monitor the Earth's surface for mapping purposes.

entities.name: AUSTRALIA
entities.description: The continent where the cropland mapping study was conducted.

entities.name: RANDOM FOREST
entities.description: A machine learning algorithm used to classify cropland versus non-cropland.

entities.name: GOOGLE EARTH ENGINE
entities.description: A cloud computing platform used for processing geospatial data and running algorithms.

entities.name: LANDSAT-8
entities.description: A satellite providing multi-spectral imagery used as the data source.

entities.name: LANDSAT BANDS
entities.description: Specific spectral bands including blue, green, red, NIR, SWIR1, temp, NDVI, and NDWI.

entities.name: MEAN VALUE COMPOSITING
entities.description: A technique used to composite multi-temporal data into a single layer.

entities.name: ACCURACY ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of evaluating the precision of the generated cropland map.

entities.name: FIELD SURVEY
entities.description: Ground-truth data collection used for independent validation.

entities.name: HIGH RESOLUTION IMAGERY
entities.description: Sub-meter to 5-m spatial resolution imagery used for validation.

entities.name: SPATIAL RESOLUTION
entities.description: The level of detail in an image, specifically 30-m, 250-m, and 1-km in this study.
